steps.title: Write the ticket equation
steps.content:
$x$ is the number of $80$-dollar tickets and $y$ is the number of $240$-dollar tickets. The airline sold $130$ tickets total, so:
$$x+y=130$$

steps.title: Write the revenue equation
steps.content:
The revenue from the two ticket prices is:
$$80x+240y=28{,}800$$
Together with $x+y=130$, this is the system shown in the matching choice. The answer is A.
